cross_scene_arcs.title: Descent into Complicity and Moral Reckoning
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Burnham transitions from initial moral hesitation about endangering a woman and child to full complicity in the heist, only to later shift focus toward protecting Sarah, culminating in a life-saving act that redefines his role.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: reluctant participant disturbed by presence of hostages
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: protective caregiver who defies Raoul to save Sarah
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: remains trapped in a violent situation despite moral shift

cross_scene_arcs.title: Tactical Leadership and Physical Collapse
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Burnham assumes control of the intruders' strategy, executing a technical plan to pressure the occupants, but his hesitation and eventual injury during a gas ignition result in severe burns and incapacitation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: emerges as tactical leader planning non-lethal containment
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: physical trauma and inability to manage pain or continue operations

cross_scene_arcs.title: Survival Under Coercion and Tactical Awareness
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Burnham endures physical torture by Raoul and witnesses Junior's execution, forcing him into compliance while sharpening his awareness of Raoul's lethal control over the group.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: subjugated and injured under Raoul's threat
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: isolated survivor aware of Raoul's willingness to kill
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: how to survive with no allies and a homicidal partner

cross_scene_arcs.title: Acquisition and Loss of the Heist Prize
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Burnham secures the bearer bonds from the safe, escapes the panic room, and attempts to flee with the prize, only to be shot by police and die as the bonds scatter around him.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: successfully acquires fourteen million-dollar bearer bonds
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: fatally shot, dies in foyer with bonds lost
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: fate of the bonds and failure to escape with the loot

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Incompetence to Technical Mastery Under Duress
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Meg evolves from fumbling with the alarm system to actively repairing the panic room phone and monitoring intruders, demonstrating growing technical competence under crisis.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Struggles to arm the alarm system despite being drunk, requiring manual guidance.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Disassembles and repairs the panic room phone, directing Sarah in coordinated troubleshooting.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Her technical solutions remain fragile and dependent on limited resources.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Mother-Daughter Dynamic: From Strain to Co-Survival
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: The relationship between Meg and Sarah shifts from emotional distance to interdependent survival, with Sarah increasingly asserting competence and Meg learning to rely on her.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Sarah displays attitude; Meg struggles to manage her while under stress.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Sarah actively saves Meg in the elevator and later snaps her back during a panic attack, solidifying a co-survivor bond.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether their strengthened bond can withstand the trauma they've endured.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Psychological Resilience and Breakdown Under Siege
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Meg experiences a severe panic attack and dissociation, recovers through Sarah's intervention, endures violent trauma, and ultimately survives physically unharmed but emotionally scarred.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Suffers hallucinations and sensory distortion during a panic attack in the panic room.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Emerges physically unharmed but emotionally shaken after surviving explosion, fire, and final confrontation.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Long-term psychological impact of the night's events remains unaddressed.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Escalation and Resolution of Intruder Conflict
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Meg transitions from passive discovery of intruders to active resistance, using fire, deception, and tactical decisions to protect Sarah and survive the home invasion.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Discovers intruders on monitors with disbelief and confusion.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Survives final confrontation, manipulates police response, and emerges after Raoul's death and Burnham's escape.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Emotional aftermath of violence and betrayal by Burnham remains unresolved.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Disobedience to Agency in Crisis
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sarah evolves from passive resistance in domestic settings to active problem-solving during the home invasion, asserting control over her environment and contributing critically to survival.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: disobedient and emotionally withdrawn in shared spaces
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: recognized as resourceful and capable under pressure

cross_scene_arcs.title: Mother-Daughter Estrangement to Reconnection
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sarah and Meg move from emotional distance and conflict to mutual reliance and affection, with shared trauma catalyzing reconciliation and deeper bonding.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: emotional distance and noncompliance toward Meg

cross_scene_arcs.title: Escalating Physical Vulnerability and Dependence
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sarah's medical condition deteriorates under stress, shifting her from active participant to physically dependent on Meg for survival during a hypoglycemic crisis.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: shows early signs of dizziness and instability
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: medically unstable, convulsing, and fully dependent on maternal intervention
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: lack of access to consistent medical support during emergency

cross_scene_arcs.title: Claiming and Defending Personal Space
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sarah identifies the panic room as her own and progressively acts to secure it against intruders, transforming it from a symbolic personal domain into a defended space of survival.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: declares panic room as her own
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: actively defends the space and uses it as a base for resistance
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: initial conflict over control of the room remains latent
